text: Welcome aboard, helper_alex — glad to have you with us as a moderator. Jump into the welcome flow anytime if you need a hand.
Welcome aboard, newbie_kim — happy to have you here as a member. If you need anything, the community team is around.
Welcome aboard, mentor_lina — great to have you joining as a mentor. Looking forward to seeing you around the community.
Welcome aboard, guide_sam — excited to have you helping as an event_helper. Thanks for joining the community.
